body_txt: A male character who is In Touch with His Feminine Side , Camp Gay , Camp Straight , androgynous - looking , transgender and hasn’t done voice training or hormones yet , or just generally effeminate will often have a softer or more high-pitched voice than other males. Sometimes this is their natural voice and other times it's intentionally pitched. It's not uncommon to see even adult males voiced by women . This is often done to set up an Unsettling Gender-Reveal . It's also common in Sensitive Guy and Manly Man , Noble Male, Roguish Male , or Masculine–Feminine Gay Couple setups, with the more masculine partner having a deeper voice. Keets often have girlish voices to accentuate their "hyper and effeminate" persona. With eunuchs , they often have a Creepy High-Pitched Voice and effeminate appearance, especially if they were castrated at a young age. The Spear Counterpart to Tomboyish Voice , where masculine women have gruff voices with aggressive inflections. This often results in Vocal Dissonance , especially with adult examples. Contrast Baritone of Strength , which represents a masculine man with a fittingly imposing voice. See also Screams Like a Little Girl .
